name: deploy-gate
stdout:
Step 4 (deploy-gate) complete. No commit per rule 6.

**Files created:**
- `scripts/review-gate/deploy-gate.mjs` — deploy wrapper CLI
- `scripts/review-gate/tests/deploy-gate.test.mjs` — 6-test suite
- `scripts/review-gate/tests/mocks/deploy-recorder.mjs` — mock deploy command
- `scripts/review-gate/deploy-gate.test.mjs` — tdd-guard shim (same pattern as steps 0-3)

**File modified:** `phases/3-review-gate/index.json` — step 4 completed with summary/contract/completed_at.

**Implementation:** `deploy-gate.mjs --unit --state --capsule --deploy-cmd` enforces the 3-way binding check before deploying: (1) verifyCapsule() integrity (2) state.pass_records[capsuleHash] existence (3) working-tree hashes vs capsule manifest — any failure exits 1 with CAPSULE_TAMPERED/NO_PASS_RECORD/WORKTREE_DRIFT on stderr and never invokes the deploy command. On full pass runs the deploy command once per file substituting `{file}` with the CAPSULE-internal copy path (never working-tree), propagating non-zero exits unchanged. Corrupt state.json or unexpected exception → top-level catch → exit 6.

**Design decision flagged:** repo path contains a space, so instead of a custom quote-parser for the --deploy-cmd template, the deploy command spawns with cwd set to deploy-gate.mjs's own directory so templates use relative space-free paths (mirrors reviewer.mjs resolving mocks relative to capsuleDir).

**Verification:** AC `node --test scripts/review-gate/tests/deploy-gate.test.mjs` → 6/6. Full regression `node --test 'scripts/review-gate/tests/*.test.mjs'` → 42/42 (36 prior + 6 new). Only `scripts/review-gate/**` + `phases/3-review-gate/index.json` touched. No real vsp/reviewer invoked — mock-only per Forbidden.
